title: Microsoft expands Azure AI and HPC infrastructure with AMD - The Official Microsoft Blog
summary: Co-designed with AMD, HDv2 VMs expand Azure’s portfolio of purpose-built solutions for the most demanding CPU workloads from AI customers, including data preparation, search, reinforcement learning and agent coordination at scale.
